articles.one_line: AI will create more jobs for humans, not replace them, Amazon founder Bezos says

articles.title: Bethell bags late double as England edge New Zealand on first day of Oval Test
articles.summary: Jacob Bethell and debutant Sonny Baker took two wickets apiece as England reduced New Zealand to 291-7 at stumps on day one of the second Test at the Kia Oval.
articles.one_line: Bethell bags late double as England edge New Zealand on first day of Oval Test

articles.title: Archer's box-office spell to Phillips lights up The Oval
articles.summary: Jofra Archer showed no signs of rust as he made his England Test return, the pacer producing a box-office, fiery eight-over spell of short-pitched bowling late on the first day of the second Test agai
